{{CargoRelic
|name=Group Photo with Pandas
|class_id=20294
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=After a close encounter with the pandas who traveled from afar, Snail took this photo with them to commemorate the celebration and preserve this beautiful memory forever!
|fame=18
|art=14
|fth=29
|civ=16
|tech=13
|ss1=Per 500 FTH, Snail ATK +1<br>FTH: 15000/15000
|ss2=Per 500 FTH, Snail ATK +2<br>FTH: 15000/15000
|ss3=Per 500 FTH, Snail ATK +3<br>FTH: 15000/15000
|ss4=Per 500 FTH, Snail ATK +3<br>FTH: 15000/15000
|ss7=Per 500 FTH, Snail ATK +3<br>FTH: 15000/15000<br> (Awakened)
}}
